text:
User: help me carve out a plan, this is coming from Trellis recommendations to be able to land Chirp issue 30. don't implement anything -- just help me with a plan -- should we aim for the time-travel thing? [...]   For v2 time travel, NMP still needs the trace export/replay side of #2809. Trellis #114 provides the serialized trace foundation, but NMP needs retention/redaction/export policy and
  tooling around it. [...] - **Trellis trace-tooling cluster (very active right now):** #141 (versioned data scripts/trace files — closed #114), #83 ("Add transaction trace scenario replay"), #142 ("Build Flight Recorder trace replay demo"), **#160** ("Rebuild Flight Recorder as a trace workstation," merged today) — turned Flight Recorder into a full evidence workstation: provenance, transaction timeline, phase ladder, receipt inspector, replay/raw-trace tabs; explicit about `[BUNDLED FIXTURE]` vs `[LIVE UNAVAILABLE]` (no live WASM engine wired yet). This is functionally a time-travel/trace-replay UI already shipping under epic #87, distinct from and not yet connected to NMP's proposed nmp-devtools MCP surface (#2809) or chirp's X-Ray pane (#30). Closest existing artifact to "time-travel tooling." [...] Assistant: **Epic created: [nostr-multi-platform#2858](https://github.com/pablof7z/nostr-multi-platform/issues/2858)** — no epic existed before (the surveyor confirmed nothing ties this workstream together; the closest ancestors, NMP #2626/#2627, are closed). I cross-linked it from chirp#30 and NMP#2809, and yes: **time travel is in the plan as committed scope (Phase E), not a stretch goal** — per your message, it's written up as the recorded/replayable debugging capsule with scrubbing, not log viewing. [...] - **Phase E — time travel** (chirp#30 v2): dev-only recorder, ring-buffer retention with explicit export, redaction policy with local/debug vs shareable modes, correlation persisted into the capsule so scrubbing reconstructs full cause chains (refcount 2→1 vs 1→0→CLOSE), and replay-from-capsule-alone so a redacted trace attached to an issue is debuggable without the device or live relays. [...] One reuse note the surveyor surfaced: Trellis's **Flight Recorder workstation** (trellis#160, merged today) is already a full trace-replay UI — provenance, transaction timeline, receipt inspector, replay tabs. Phase E should feed NMP capsules into it for desktop-side inspection rather than building a second scrubber; the epic says so.
